items.headline: Anthropic + OpenAI parallel enterprise-services JVs (May 4)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Anthropic + OpenAI parallel enterprise-services JVs (May 4) — Anthropic announces $1.5B JV with Blackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachs ($300M each); OpenAI confirms parallel "The Development Company"; the equity-shape becomes the canonical commercial-deployment template for sub-cyber frontier AI under Pentagon-blacklist conditions** — Yesterday's report had the May 1 8-vendor Pentagon framing + Anthropic's $50B / OpenAI's $122B funding rounds but didn't anticipate the parallel-JV equity-template move. Today re-reads the Pentagon-blacklist as the forcing function for the JV-template emergence.

items.headline: Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 RSAC 2026 zero-trust stack
items.diff_narrative: **New: Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 RSAC 2026 zero-trust stack — Cisco ships Zero Trust Access for agents through Duo IAM + open-source DefenseClaw + AI Defense: Explorer Edition; pairs with Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA control-plane (Defender + Entra ID + Purview); CSA May 1 framing makes identity Zero Trust's first pillar in the agentic-AI era** — Yesterday's report had Microsoft Agent 365 + Cisco DefenseClaw as separate threads. Today merges them as the converging RSAC-week identity-control-plane primitive.

items.headline: SGLang vs vLLM 29% throughput gap (LeetLLM + Premai 2026)
items.diff_narrative: **New: SGLang vs vLLM 29% throughput gap (LeetLLM + Premai 2026) — SGLang and LMDeploy at ~16,200 tok/s vs vLLM ~12,500 tok/s on H100; RadixAttention prefix-cache compounds for shared-context workloads (agentic, RAG, multi-turn); SGLang day-0 support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2; SGLang Diffusion extends to video + image (Jan 2026)** — Yesterday's report tracked SGLang CVE-2026-5760 carry but not the production-serving Pareto-split benchmark numbers. Today adds the throughput-gap quantification + day-0 model coverage.

items.headline: Unsloth 12x MoE + Hugging Face BERT/embedding pact + NVIDIA DGX Spark
items.diff_narrative: **New: Unsloth 12x MoE + Hugging Face BERT/embedding pact + NVIDIA DGX Spark — Unsloth ships 12x MoE training + ultra-long-context RL + 1.8-3.3x faster BERT/embedding/classifier training with 20% less VRAM (joint with Hugging Face); NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage guide raises laptop fine-tuning performance 2.5x; Unsloth Studio 100%-offline runtime ships GGUF + Safetensors with tool-calling + OpenAI-compatible API** — Yesterday's report had Unsloth 2026.4.8 carry but not the 12x MoE + Hugging Face BERT pact + DGX Spark partnership wave.

items.headline: AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print preview
items.diff_narrative: **Updated: AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print preview — gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% (post-MI308 reserve-reversal cliff); MI308 China revenue collapses ~$390M Q4 to ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); Cathie Wood ARK trims $79.9M AMD into the print; consensus reaffirms +33% YoY rev growth on Helios + Ryzen AI 400 + MI400 ramp; OpenAI 6GW MI450 first deployment H2 2026 carries** — Yesterday's report had the AMD May 5 print + DA Davidson $375 PT but not the China-cliff $390M→$100M quantification + Cathie Wood ARK trim signal.
